section_miscategorizations.text: The doctor states the patient has peripheral neuropathy.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is a diagnostic impression/synthesis by the clinician, not an exam or test finding.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient will increase metformin to four milligrams twice a day.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This appears to be an erroneous dosage statement for metformin (an assessment/accuracy issue), but as a treatment instruction it belongs in the Plan; the misplacement is minor and organizationally acceptable.
